ratings.note: Upgraded from Crisil A-/Positive; short-term Crisil A1 upgraded from Crisil A2+; total bank facilities rated enhanced to INR479cr from INR363cr. FY25 revenue +19.5%, exports grew to INR338cr from INR99cr FY24, operating margin >17% over FY24-25, in-hand orders ~INR580cr, networth >INR525cr, gearing <0.5x

Agency: Infomerics (IVR). Infomerics (IVR) reaffirmed IVR A/Stable (INR134.22cr, reduced from INR149.63cr) and IVR A1 short-term (INR22cr); total INR156.22cr. Cites sustained scale improvement, healthy profitability though margins moderated in FY25, elongated operating cycle, project execution risk from ongoing capex, competitive/fragmented/cyclic industry

Outlook revised to Positive from Stable, rating reaffirmed at Crisil A (long-term) / Crisil A1 (short-term); total bank facilities rated enhanced to INR600cr from INR479cr. FY26 revenue grew to INR1,167cr from INR958cr, operating margin ~17%
ratings.source: CRISIL Ratings rationale / BSE Reg 30 disclosure, 23 Jun 2026
